mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( usr_no, login_id, secu_pw, usr_nm, tel_no, birth_dt, email, acnt_stat_cd, gender, eng_nm, zip_cd, addr , addr_dtl, reg_dt ) VALUES ( SEQ_USERS.NEXTVAL, #{login_id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birth}, #{email}, '정상', #{gender}, #{e_name}, #{postal_code}, #{address}, #{address_detail}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO accounts_personal ( acnt_no, secu_acnt_pwd, bank_nm, acnt_num, usr_no, balance, currency, acnt_stat_cd, lmt_once, lmt_daily ) VALUES ( SEQ_ACCOUNTS_PERSONAL.NEXTVAL, #{account_pw}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, SEQ_USERS.CURRVAL, #{balance}, #{currency}, #{account_status}, #{limit_one_time}, #{limit_daily} )

INSERT INTO foreign_accounts_personal ( acnt_no, acnt_pwd, bank_nm, acnt_num, usr_no, acnt_stat_cd, lmt_once, lmt_daily ) VALUES ( SEQ_FOREIGN_ACCOUNTS_PERSONAL.NEXTVAL, #{account_pw}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, SEQ_USERS.CURRVAL, #{account_status}, #{limit_one_time}, #{limit_daily} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts_personal WHERE acnt_no = #{account_no}
